zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱的整理行情
zh.content:
当前ETH/美元处于窄幅震荡整理结构，价格围绕1658附近运行，整体缺乏明确方向。短线多次上探未能有效突破1662一线阻力，反复受压回落，显示上方抛压仍存，趋势略偏弱，市场观望情绪较浓。

技术指标方面，价格持续运行在20日均线1680下方，均线系统呈压制状态。MACD指标为负值-19.31，动能柱偏弱，说明空头动能仍占优，但缺乏加速下跌信号。RSI暂缺，需观察后续补充。

支撑位关注1655附近短期低点，一旦跌破可能下探更低震荡区间。上方关键阻力在1662及1680均线附近，若无法放量突破，价格仍以区间震荡为主。

建议短线以区间交易为主，高抛低吸思路更为稳健。未突破1662前避免追多，若回踩1655不破可轻仓试多，跌破则顺势观望或短空控制风险。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETH/USD is currently consolidating around 1658 after a very tight 24-hour range, indicating low volatility and indecision. Price action remains capped below the 20-period SMA at 1680.99, suggesting that the broader short-term trend leans slightly bearish despite the marginal daily gain of 0.17%. The market structure shows repeated failure to break above 1662, reinforcing a short-term sideways-to-downward bias unless momentum improves.

Momentum indicators suggest weakening downside pressure but no confirmed reversal. MACD remains negative at -19.31, indicating bearish momentum is still dominant, although the flat price action implies potential exhaustion of selling strength. With RSI unavailable, price behavior around the SMA becomes more critical. The inability to reclaim 1680 continues to signal that buyers are not yet in control, keeping sentiment cautious and range-bound overall.

Immediate support sits near 1655–1656, aligned with the session low and current consolidation floor. A break below this zone could expose 1640 as the next downside extension level. On the upside, resistance is first encountered at 1662, followed by a more significant barrier at the 20-day SMA near 1681. Price compression between these levels suggests a breakout is likely once volatility returns.

Strategy favors patience until a clear breakout confirms direction. Range traders may consider buying near 1655 with tight stops below 1640, targeting a move back toward 1662. Conversely, rejection at 1662 or below SMA resistance could justify short-term short positions aiming for 1650 or lower. Breakout traders should wait for a decisive close above 1681 to confirm bullish continuation and improved momentum conditions.
